markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Clarify GrowthX's capabilities, process, and partnership fit.](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**U.S. First:** The engagement will focus exclusively on the U.S. market for the 8-week strategy sprint to ensure rapid results. French/German content is a Phase 2 project, starting \~3 months in.](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [**Client-Led Strategy:** Hilti provides the core strategy (ICP, topics); GrowthX executes by scaling quality content for SEO/GEO. GrowthX will not create brand voice guides.](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [**High Demand:** GrowthX's limited capacity (2 new clients/week) means no pricing concessions are available. An agreement by early December secures a January kickoff.](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)

## Topics

### Partnership Model & Expectations

  - [GrowthX's model is a partnership where Hilti provides the strategic foundation, and GrowthX executes at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [**Hilti's Role:**](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [Provide all foundational brand assets: ICP, personas, brand guidelines, product marketing materials.](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
      - [Define key business topics for authority (e.g., "FireStop").](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Role:**](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [Use Hilti's assets to build internal "artifacts" (language models) that ensure brand voice consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
      - [Identify SEO/GEO opportunities and create content at scale (target: 5 articles/week).](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
      - [Provide guidance on tailoring content to specific personas (e.g., C-suite vs. IC).](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)

### Engagement Structure & Timeline

  - [The engagement is structured in two phases:](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
    1.  **8-Week Strategy Sprint:**
          - [**Goal:** Drive rapid results in the U.S. market.](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
          - [**Deliverables:** A content roadmap with SEO/GEO opportunities and sample articles.](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
          - [**Why:** Proves value and builds confidence for the long-term partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
    2.  **12-Month Growth Execution:**
          - [**Goal:** Scale content production to 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
          - [**French/German Content:** Begins \~3 months into this phase.](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
          - [**Why:** Allows the team to master the U.S. workflow before building new market capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)

### French & German Content Strategy

  - [GrowthX can create content for these markets but has not done so before.](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [**Method:** AI-driven translation and market-specific research, not native speakers.](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [**Why Phased:** This approach is a test case. A sample article cannot be provided pre-engagement because the team is fully focused on delivering for current clients.](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)

### Performance & Feedback Loop

  - [Performance is tracked via bi-weekly reviews of Google Analytics and Google Search Console data.](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
  - [**Why:** Enables data-driven pivots to focus on high-performing topics.](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
  - [The feedback loop focuses on content performance (clicks, conversions), not refining Hilti's core ICP or brand voice.](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Rationale:** Time is better spent on content quality and structure for AI search than on endless brand voice refinement, which offers lower ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Send the standard agreement to Hilti for review.](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [**Hilti Team:** Review the agreement and discuss internally.](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [**Hilti Team:** Secure a January kickoff by signing the agreement by early December.](https://fathom.video/share/qkG7eyRCxQkvsWW1Q1b7mLEY6K-P7Njg?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
